description: New preprint: Lessons from Neuroscience for AI: How integrating Actions, Compositional Structure and Episodic Memory could enable Safe, Interpretable and Human-Like AI — with Rajesh P. N. Rao, Linxing Preston Jiang, Matthew Bryan, and Prashant Rangarajan.
Wrapped up my Applied Scientist Internship at Amazon (A9 / Search Science & AI), where I worked on RL fine-tuning for multimodal tool-using agents.
Paper accepted at the Structural Priors Workshop at RSS 2024: Learning Hierarchical Abstractions of Complex Dynamics using Predictive Coding.
Active Predictive Coding is now published in Neural Computation Journal!
